content: We should have an evil version of team building which is called "team lying" where we all spread misinformation.

I cleared Wave 5 A5 MADNESS mode with this team, Ramona really synergies well with G-Ramona, and the Tavern posse is quite op, I used Tawil since she's the undisputed best unit in the game, (G-Helot is just the embryo bot).
